title: Pick It Up!
description: Pick It Up! is a smart inventory mod ⚡ that automatically picks up selected items 🎒 based on your settings. It runs entirely client-side 💻 and works on any server 🌐 by simulating fast, seamless item pickups and swaps 🤖.
body:

## **Pick It Up! 🧲**  
**Pick It Up!** is a smart inventory automation mod ⚡ that automatically collects and organizes selected items into your inventory 🎒 based on your personal settings. It works entirely **client-side** 💻, meaning it functions on any server 🌐 by simulating fast, automated item pickups and swaps 🤖.

# ⚠️ **Important:**  
On some servers, this mod **may be bannable** 🚫 because it automates item pickups and inventory swaps at high speed. Always check the server rules before using it!
**For example it is banned on my server:** [**Mod list**](https://vocal-kataifi-3f46c1.netlify.app/)

### 📂 **Open Menu:**  
Press **H** to open the configuration menu.

## **Main Features: 🚀**

- **Smart Auto Pickup 🧠:** Automatically picks up only the items you want, based on customizable filters and rules.

- **Automatic Swapping 🔄:** Replaces unwanted or low-priority items with important ones on the fly.

- **Inventory Optimization 🎯:** Keeps your inventory clean and efficient without manual sorting.

- **Server Compatible 🌍:** No server-side plugins required. Works by simulating legitimate player actions through optimized packets 📡.

# ❓ Can I use this mod in a modpack? 📦

***Of course! Please feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!*** 💜✨

You may:

* ✅ Use this mod in public and private modpacks
* ✅ Upload modpacks containing this mod to Modrinth, CurseForge, etc.
* ✅ Use it on servers and with friends

Just please:

* ❌ Do not reupload the mod itself
* ❌ Do not claim the mod as your own

Have fun! 🌟
